Package cpdt.backend.controllers

package cpdt.backend.controllers
Provides REST controllers for the Digital Twin backend.

This package exposes HTTP endpoints that allow external clients to interact with the backend services. The controllers provide access to device information, telemetry history, Digital Twin state, and alarm management while delegating business logic to the service layer.

These controllers follow the REST architectural style and act as the entry point for client requests to the backend application.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    cpdt.backend
    Implements the backend module of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AlertController
    Exposes REST endpoints for managing process alarms.
    DeviceController
    Exposes REST endpoints for accessing registered device information.
    TelemetryController
    Exposes REST endpoints for querying historical telemetry data.
    TwinController
    Exposes REST endpoints for accessing the Digital Twin state.
